news.title: Catalyst Pharmaceuticals: Angelini Deal Caps A Potentially Better Story (NASDAQ:CPRX) - Seeking Alpha
news.summary: Catalyst Pharmaceuticals is being acquired by Angelini Pharma for $4.1 billion ($31.50/share), a significant premium that has driven strong price momentum. The deal is supported by strong Q1 revenue growth and a favorable rare-disease drug pipeline, though shareholder investigations and guidance suspension add some uncertainty.
